summary: Update ARCHITECTURE.md and COMPONENT_INDEX.md to reflect R2 structure
problem_statement: The R2 refactor significantly changes the project's module structure: components are decomposed, shared hooks and utilities are extracted, error handling is centralised, and the server is restructured. If documentation is not updated to reflect these changes, it becomes misleading — directing developers to files and patterns that no longer exist and omitting the new shared modules they should use.
in_scope: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the new module structure introduced by R2 (shared hooks, utilities, error handling, decomposed components)
Update COMPONENT_INDEX.md to list the new decomposed component modules and remove references to the old monolithic files
Document the new shared modules (apiRequest, useStages, useSubStages, parseIdParam, logger, constants)
Document the error-handling architecture (Express middleware, ErrorBoundary, custom error class)
out_of_scope: Writing new documentation beyond ARCHITECTURE.md and COMPONENT_INDEX.md
Creating documentation for features not changed by R2
requirements: ARCHITECTURE.md accurately describes the post-R2 module structure
COMPONENT_INDEX.md lists all decomposed components and their locations
New shared modules are documented with their purpose and location
No references to pre-R2 monolithic file structures remain in either document
acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md and COMPONENT_INDEX.md are updated to reflect the R2 structure
New shared modules, hooks, and utilities are documented
Decomposed component locations are listed accurately
No stale references to pre-refactor file structures remain
dependencies: All prior R2 phases — documentation should reflect the final state after all refactoring is complete
risks: Documentation may need further updates if late-phase changes alter the structure — update docs as the final task
implementation_notes: This should be the final task executed in the R2 sequence. Review the actual file structure after all refactoring is complete rather than documenting the planned structure. Include a brief section on the shared modules directory and how to use the extracted hooks and utilities.
